justification: 8 documented failure modes reduce pass rate
Advanced categories: state recovery, replay semantics, multi-component interaction, journal reconstruction

predicted_failure_modes: The model will see NOP runs pass on simple scenarios and assume the logic is completely repaired.
The model will repair shard state without aligning sequence order.
The model will assume relative paths work and miss path checks.
The model will replay journals using alphabetical file sequence rather than global event seq order.
